violations.text: The doors to the outside, located at the store entrance, are not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 01/10/2025

The doors to the outside, located at the entrance, are not tight-fitting. Space observed between the doors. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of black/brown residue and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/10/2023

The floor in the warewashing area is in poor repair. A portion of tile is missing under the 3-bay sink resulting in a gap and concrete exposed. This area is no longer smooth, durable, easily cleanable and non-absorbent. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 12/06/2023
